surface_strategies.bento_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 sm:gap-8

sections_architecture.name: Header
sections_architecture.design: Sticky, Crystal Glassmorphism surface, clear brand logo, Links (Features, Modules, Pricing), primary CTA (Request Demo).

sections_architecture.name: Hero
sections_architecture.design: Immersive. Pale blue gradient blob in bg. Massive typography (Outfit, Light). Subheadline in Manrope. CTA group: Request Demo (Primary Button), Sign Up (Secondary), Login (Ghost). Floating dashboard mockup image with high-end glassmorphism borders.

sections_architecture.name: Marquee_Integrations
sections_architecture.design: Living Texture strategy. Very slow drift. Monospace font. Items: ABHA, PMJAY, HFR, NHA Compliant. High contrast but small size. Generous gaps (gap-24).

sections_architecture.name: Features_Bento
sections_architecture.design: Tetris Grid. 8 items (OPD, IPD, Billing, EMR, Lab, Pharmacy, Analytics, Govt Integrations). Mix shapes: The Hero card (spans 2x2) for EMR, smaller squares for Pharmacy/Billing. Use subtle pastel blue/gray backgrounds on cards. Hover states lift and reveal a primary blue border.

sections_architecture.name: Modules_Technical_Grid
sections_architecture.design: Expose the skeleton. Grid Borders look. A strictly organized 3x3 or 4x2 grid of modules (Reception, Billing, Pharmacy, Radiology, etc.). Clean icons (lucide-react), pure white background, crisp 1px borders.

sections_architecture.name: Pricing
sections_architecture.design: 4-Tier pricing (Basic, Standard, Premium, Enterprise). 'Premium' tier gets The 'Tracing Beam' treatment or a subtle blue glow and 'Enterprise' is dark/obsidian colored to contrast against the light theme. Bold typography.

sections_architecture.name: Demo_Request_Form
sections_architecture.design: Split layout. Left: Trust elements (Hospital exterior image, text). Right: Form using customized Shadcn inputs. Form fields: Hospital Name, Contact, Mobile, Email, Beds, State, Date (Calendar). Fields must use modern, flat, crisp styling.

sections_architecture.name: Testimonials
sections_architecture.design: Overlapping cards or a smooth carousel. Use avatars, high-contrast quotes.

sections_architecture.name: Security_Compliance
sections_architecture.design: Minimalist icon-driven grid. Highlight HIPAA, ISO, ABHA compliance. Use 'Medical Blue' highlights.

sections_architecture.name: FAQ
sections_architecture.design: Shadcn Accordion. Minimal borders, bold question text.

sections_architecture.name: Footer
sections_architecture.design: Massive padding (py-32). Dark theme inversion (Navy/Obsidian background) to anchor the page. Huge 'Let's Talk' text.

animation_rules.general: Smooth, purposeful. Use framer-motion for scroll reveals.
animation_rules.hover: Scale 1.02 on bento cards, button text color transition.
animation_rules.parallax: Use on Hero background and large images to create depth.

testing_attributes: All buttons, inputs, and interactive elements must have data-testid.
